# Unity generated folders

[Ll]ibrary/

[Tt]emp/

[Oo]bj/

[Bb]uild/

[Bb]uilds/

[Ll]ogs/

[Uu]ser[Ss]ettings/

# Unity cache / crash files

sysinfo.txt

*.stackdump

# Autogenerated Visual Studio / Rider files

.vs/

.vscode/

.idea/

*.csproj

*.sln

*.suo

*.user

*.userprefs

*.pidb

*.booproj

*.svd

*.pdb

*.mdb

*.opendb

*.VC.db

# Unity packages cache

[Pp]ackages/packages-lock.json

# Asset import cache

*.pidb.meta

*.pdb.meta

*.mdb.meta

# Builds

*.apk

*.aab

*.unitypackage

*.app

*.exe

# Addressables

[Aa]ssets/[Aa]ddressable[Aa]ssets[Dd]ata//.bin*

# Crash reports

[Cc]rash[Rr]eports/

# OS files

.DS_Store

Thumbs.db

Desktop.ini

# XR / OpenXR generated or local settings

Assets/XR/Settings/

Assets/XR/Settings.meta

# Do NOT ignore these important Unity folders/files:

# Assets/

# Packages/

# ProjectSettings/
